market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this luxurious entire-home retreat, just 5 minutes from London's airport. With a free parking spot, you'll feel like you're in the countryside without sacrificing convenience. This stylish property, perfect for 4 guests, features [insert more details about the property]. Enjoy the peaceful surroundings, and take advantage of nearby London's iconic attractions. With a 15-minute taxi ride to the airport, you'll be flying in and out of the city with ease.
top_amenity_gaps: Missing Outdoor amenity for hosts with a garden or outdoor area, which can increase booking value by 10-20% in some markets
No facilities (e.g., gym, pool) listed for £403.4/nt, when cohort has a median rate of £175.00
No Entertainment listed, when a nearby park or pub could entice long-stay guests and increase their average nightly rate by £5-10
analysis.photo_order_rec: Make the living room the cover photo, as guests are drawn to the first room they see when browsing listings like this, which has a low occupancy rate.
key_diagnosis: Increase nightly rate to £600.00 or higher, closing the £216.60 rate gap with the median £175.00 cohort, or explore the possibility of a lower rate (£350.00) and improved occupancy rates
Address the below-median occupancy of 25.0% booked (68 open nights) in favour of cohort's 28.3% occupancy, by adding more photos and details highlighting the property's unique selling points
Include at least 4-6 clear exterior and interior photos, to address the currently unknown photo count issue
analysis.outreach_hook: Given your £403.4/nt rate and 25.0% occupancy, could we discuss ways to optimize your listing to appeal to more guests, ensuring you reach your full revenue potential?
